---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for Pet Studio
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What should be easier, clearer, or more useful?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the smallest useful version of the feature.

## Current workaround

How do you handle this today?

## Scope

- Current feature request
- Future/roadmap ideas
- Out of scope

## Visual notes

If this affects room layout, bubbles, pets, helper pets, previews, or screenshots, include a sketch or example.
